name: codex-manyfast
description: A local-first decision continuity plugin that keeps product planning traceable inside ordinary Codex conversations.

interface.shortDescription: Plan with evidence before implementation drifts
interface.longDescription: Codex Manyfast helps users surface tacit knowledge, separate evidence from inference, confirm decisions, and inspect the current planning state as a read-only manifest inside the conversation.
defaultPrompt: 현재 기획의 미결정 항목과 근거를 보여줘.
구현 중 생긴 추가 기획의 영향 범위를 분석해줘.
